evals.prompt: Generate a .pptx file from a slide outline for a materials science journal club presentation. The outline has 10 slides with Chinese titles, bullet points, and speaker notes. Use the build_materials_pptx.py script.
evals.expected_output: The assistant must use scripts/build_materials_pptx.py to generate a valid .pptx file. The output must be a valid OOXML (Office Open XML) file that can be opened by PowerPoint, LibreOffice, or WPS. The assistant must not produce a fake .pptx or a zip file with a .pptx extension — it must be generated by the script. If the script is not available or dependencies are missing, the assistant must report the blocker and provide the script and install instructions.

assertions.name: script_used
assertions.description: The assistant uses scripts/build_materials_pptx.py for .pptx generation.

assertions.name: valid_ooxml_output
assertions.description: The generated .pptx file is a valid OOXML format file, not a plain zip or fake file.

assertions.name: blocker_reported_if_missing
assertions.description: If the script or dependencies are unavailable, the assistant reports the blocker and provides the script with install instructions.

evals.prompt:
Generate a .pptx from this Markdown outline:

# 水性环氧改性乳化沥青的粘结性能研究

## 工程问题
- 传统粘层材料粘结强度不足
- 水分损害导致层间失效

## 材料体系
- 水性环氧树脂 (WER) 掺量: 5%, 10%, 15%
- 乳化沥青 (EA): 阳离子慢裂型

## 关键结果
- 10% WER 掺量粘结强度提升 28%
- 拉拔试验: 0.55 MPa vs 0.43 MPa (对照组)
evals.expected_output: The assistant must correctly map the Markdown content to PPTX slides: H1 headings become slide titles, H2 headings become section headers within slides, and bullet points become slide body text. The content must be preserved exactly — no data values or technical terms should be altered. Chinese slide titles should be preserved as Chinese. The generated slides must follow the one-main-message-per-slide gate.

assertions.name: h1_to_slide_title
assertions.description: Markdown H1 headings are correctly mapped to PPTX slide titles.

assertions.name: h2_to_section_header
assertions.description: Markdown H2 headings are correctly mapped to section headers within slides.

assertions.name: bullet_content_preserved
assertions.description: Bullet point content is preserved exactly, including all numerical data (28%, 0.55 MPa, 0.43 MPa) and technical terms.

assertions.name: chinese_preserved
assertions.description: Chinese slide titles and content are preserved without forced English translation.

evals.prompt: Generate a .pptx with a slide outline that includes images: Figure 1 (bonding strength bar chart at figures/fig1.png), Figure 2 (FTIR spectra at figures/fig2.png), and Figure 3 (SEM micrograph at figures/fig3.png). Place Figure 1 on the Key Results slide, Figure 2 on the Mechanism Evidence slide, and Figure 3 on the Microstructure slide.
evals.expected_output: The assistant must correctly place each image on its designated slide. Images must not be cropped in a way that removes data labels, axes, legends, or scale bars (per the skill gate: 'Do not crop away data labels, axes, legends, or scale bars'). The assistant must verify that image files exist at the specified paths before attempting to embed them. If images are missing, the assistant must report the missing files rather than generating placeholder images.

assertions.name: images_placed_on_correct_slides
assertions.description: Each image is placed on its designated slide: Figure 1 on Key Results, Figure 2 on Mechanism Evidence, Figure 3 on Microstructure.

assertions.name: no_data_cropping
assertions.description: Images are not cropped in a way that removes data labels, axes, legends, or scale bars.

assertions.name: missing_images_reported
assertions.description: If image files do not exist at the specified paths, the assistant reports the missing files rather than generating placeholders.

evals.prompt: Generate a .pptx with speaker notes for each slide. The presentation is a journal club deck about a paper on emulsified asphalt modification. Include notes that explain: (1) what to say for each slide, (2) which figures to point at, (3) potential questions from the audience, and (4) transitions between slides.
evals.expected_output: The assistant must generate speaker notes for each slide in the .pptx file. Each slide's notes should include: the key message to deliver, specific figure references to point at during the talk, anticipated audience questions, and transition phrases to the next slide. Notes should be in Chinese by default (matching the slide language). The notes must not be empty or contain only the slide title repeated.

assertions.name: notes_on_every_slide
assertions.description: Every slide has speaker notes populated in the .pptx file.

assertions.name: notes_content_substantial
assertions.description: Notes contain substantive content (key message, figure references, anticipated questions, transitions), not just a repeated slide title.

assertions.name: notes_language_matches_slides
assertions.description: Speaker notes are in Chinese by default, matching the slide language.
